title: At the Market

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ الْخَيْرِ، أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَشْتَرِيَ بَعْضَ الْفَوَاكِهِ وَالْخُضَارِ.
lines.bs: Dobro jutro, željela bih kupiti nešto voća i povrća.
lines.en: Good morning, I would like to buy some fruit and vegetables.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: صَبَاحُ النُّورِ! تَفَضَّلِي. عِنْدِي أَجْوَدُ الْفَوَاكِهِ الطَّازَجَةِ الْيَوْمَ. مَاذَا تُرِيدِينَ؟
lines.bs: Dobro jutro! Izvolite. Danas imam najkvalitetnije svježe voće. Šta želite?
lines.en: Good morning! Please come in. I have the best fresh fruits today. What do you want?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أُرِيدُ كِيلُوغْرَامَيْنِ مِنَ التُّفَّاحِ وَكِيلُوغْرَامًا مِنَ الطَّمَاطِمِ.
lines.bs: Želim dva kilograma jabuka i kilogram paradajza.
lines.en: I want two kilograms of apples and one kilogram of tomatoes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: التُّفَّاحُ طَازَجٌ جِدًّا، وَصَلَ الْيَوْمَ. التُّفَّاحُ بِثَلَاثَةِ دَرَاهِمَ لِلْكِيلُوغْرَامِ وَالطَّمَاطِمُ بِدِرْهَمَيْنِ.
lines.bs: Jabuke su jako svježe, stigle su danas. Jabuke su tri dirhema po kilogramu a paradajz dva dirhema.
lines.en: The apples are very fresh, they arrived today. Apples are three dirhams per kilogram and tomatoes two dirhams.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: هَذَا غَالٍ قَلِيلًا. هَلْ يُمْكِنُكَ تَخْفِيضُ السِّعْرِ؟
lines.bs: To je malo skupo. Možete li sniziti cijenu?
lines.en: That is a little expensive. Can you lower the price?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: حَسَنًا، إِذَا أَخَذْتِ ثَلَاثَةَ كِيلُوغْرَامَاتٍ مِنَ التُّفَّاحِ سَأُعْطِيكِ سِعْرًا خَاصًّا.
lines.bs: Dobro, ako uzmete tri kilograma jabuka dat ću vam posebnu cijenu.
lines.en: Very well, if you take three kilograms of apples I will give you a special price.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What is the special price then?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: ثَمَانِيَةُ دَرَاهِمَ لِثَلَاثَةِ كِيلُوغْرَامَاتٍ بَدَلًا مِنْ تِسْعَةٍ. هَذَا عَرْضٌ جَيِّدٌ.
lines.bs: Osam dirhema za tri kilograma umjesto devet. To je dobra ponuda.
lines.en: Eight dirhams for three kilograms instead of nine. That is a good deal.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: مُوَافِقٌ. سَآخُذُ ثَلَاثَةَ كِيلُوغْرَامَاتٍ مِنَ التُّفَّاحِ وَكِيلُوغْرَامًا مِنَ الطَّمَاطِمِ.
lines.bs: Slažem se. Uzet ću tri kilograma jabuka i kilogram paradajza.
lines.en: Agreed. I will take three kilograms of apples and one kilogram of tomatoes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: عَظِيمٌ! الْمَجْمُوعُ عَشَرَةُ دَرَاهِمَ. هَلْ تُرِيدِينَ شَيْئًا آخَرَ؟
lines.bs: Odlično! Ukupno deset dirhema. Želite li još nešto?
lines.en: Excellent! The total is ten dirhams. Would you like anything else?

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, do you have fresh lemon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، اللَّيْمُونُ بِدِرْهَمَيْنِ لِلْكِيلُوغْرَامِ. إِنَّهُ حَامِضٌ وَلَذِيذٌ جِدًّا.
lines.bs: Da, limun je dva dirhema po kilogramu. Vrlo je kiseo i ukusan.
lines.en: Yes, lemons are two dirhams per kilogram. They are very sour and delicious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: أُرِيدُ نِصْفَ كِيلُوغْرَامٍ مِنَ اللَّيْمُونِ أَيْضًا. تَفَضَّلْ خَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ دِرْهَمًا.
lines.bs: Željela bih još pola kilograma limuna. Izvolite petnaest dirhema.
lines.en: I would like half a kilogram of lemons as well. Here are fifteen dirhams.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا لَكِ! هَذَا دِرْهَمٌ وَاحِدٌ بَاقٍ. تَفَضَّلِي كِيسًا مَجَّانًا. إِلَى اللِّقَاءِ!
lines.bs: Hvala vam! Jedan dirhem ostatka. Izvolite vrećicu besplatno. Do viđenja!
lines.en: Thank you! Here is one dirham change. Here is a bag for free. Goodbye!

grammarFocus: numbers with nouns and conditional sentences with إِذَا
